messages.author: maya
messages.text: Supabase is fine for login, but I do not want a service-role token bypassing tenant policy in normal requests.

messages.author: priya
messages.text: Then API transactions should set the tenant claim and run under RLS roles, never the shared role.

messages.author: noah
messages.text: That makes connection setup more involved, but it closes the missed-WHERE-clause escape hatch.
